decisions.title: Finalize Explore V2 GA readiness for March 31 deadline
decisions.context: Multiple E2 tickets in flight (ENG-9134 defaults, ENG-9276 Amplitude events, ENG-9533/9534 candidate runs, ENG-9823 auto-naming). GA date is TODAY (2026-03-31). Need go/no-go decision on shipping vs. delaying.
decisions.blockedBy: Outstanding bugs (ENG-9870 tooltips, ENG-9194 live mode, ENG-9709 table sync) may impact user experience

arguments.for: Strategy pillar 'Nail the Core' requires shipping foundational product. Amplitude events renamed, settings defaults ready, candidate runs visible. Delaying risks Q1 commitments and team morale.
arguments.against: Three active bugs affecting core workflows (tooltips, live mode, table sync). Shipping broken experience damages 'Decisions Captured' north star by reducing trust. Better to delay 1-2 weeks than erode product quality.

decisions.title: Prioritize CSRS (Catalog Store) migration vs. new Canvas features
decisions.context: CSRS work spans multiple tickets (ENG-9494 shadow traffic, ENG-9457 caching, ENG-9651 processor updates). Canvas getting helper updates (ENG-9506). Both critical to 'Embed Deeper' pillar but compete for eng resources.

arguments.for: CSRS is infrastructure modernization ('Build the Moat') that unblocks future scale. ENG-9778 load testing shows ingest scale challenges. Invest now to prevent Q2 performance walls.
arguments.against: Canvas drives immediate customer value and 'Decisions Captured' metric. ENG-9506 child canvas helpers enable complex workflows. CSRS benefits are 6+ months out; Canvas ships value weekly.

decisions.title: Commit to Python Rules scope for Q2 vs. expand Sift Edge capabilities
decisions.context: Python Rules roadmap unclear from signals. Sift Edge work visible (ENG-9654 global nav, simulator ENG-9856 multi-asset). Need resource allocation decision between established product (Python Rules) vs. emerging bet (Edge).

arguments.for: Edge is 'Build the Moat' differentiator for embedded/real-time use cases. ENG-9856 simulator multi-asset unlocks testing workflows that capture more decisions. Small team can move fast on greenfield product.
arguments.against: Python Rules serves existing enterprise customers ('Nail the Core'). No visible progress signals risk to renewals. Edge is speculative; proven product should get resources first per strategy discipline.

decisions.title: Ship SCIM user provisioning controls (ENG-9784/9785) in April or defer to Q3
decisions.context: Two SCIM tickets blocking admin deactivation and email invites for managed orgs. Enterprise security feature but unclear customer demand vs. eng effort required.

arguments.for: Enterprise compliance requirement for 'Embed Deeper' in large orgs. Blocking deactivation/invites prevents security holes. Keycloak docs (ENG-9838) suggest integration complexity already sunk; ship to close the loop.
arguments.against: No customer escalations visible. Platform work doesn't directly increase 'Decisions Captured' north star. Better to focus eng on user-facing E2/Canvas features that drive metric.

decisions.title: Address ENG-9837 metadata loading failure (65k limit) as P0 or schedule for Q2
decisions.context: Loading >65k metadata entries fails - likely data model constraint. Could block large customers from using product at scale ('Embed Deeper' risk).

arguments.for: Scale limits directly threaten 'Decisions Captured' for large customers. If enterprise customer hits this, immediate churn risk. Fix now while identified vs. waiting for escalation.
arguments.against: No evidence of customer impact yet. May be edge case that affects <5% of users. Q1 focus should remain on E2 GA and visible roadmap items vs. hypothetical scaling issues.

timeAudit.weekSummary: Critical week with E2 GA deadline TODAY driving unusually high coordination overhead. 28 meetings (norm: 18-22) reflect cross-functional alignment on go/no-go decision and bug triage.
alerts: Only 1 focus hour today - insufficient for strategic decision-making on 5 open decisions
Back-to-back meetings 9am-4pm block deep work on E2 GA assessment
Zero time allocated for Q2 planning despite April 1 start tomorrow
3 one-on-ones scheduled on deadline day may signal team anxiety about launch readiness

events.title: Explore V2 GA Target Date
events.description: Planned GA for Explore V2. Decision blocked on bug resolution (tooltips, live mode, table sync). Go/no-go call required by 5pm PT.

events.title: Amplitude Event Rename Cutoff
events.description: ENG-9276: Final window to rename E2 events before GA to follow best practices. Analytics continuity at risk if delayed.

events.title: Q2 Resource Allocation Decision
events.description: Commit Python Rules scope vs. Sift Edge expansion for Q2. Determines eng allocation across 'Nail Core' vs 'Build Moat' pillars.

events.title: Metadata Scale Fix Assessment
events.description: ENG-9837: Engineering triage on 65k metadata limit. P0 vs. Q2 backlog decision deadline.

events.title: SCIM Ship/Defer Decision
events.description: ENG-9784/9785: Commit to shipping SCIM controls in April or defer to Q3. Impacts enterprise security roadmap.

events.title: CSRS vs. Canvas Prioritization Lock
events.description: Final call on CSRS migration priority vs. Canvas feature work. Affects Q2 delivery commitments to customers.

events.title: Load Testing Results Review
events.description: ENG-9778: Review ingest scale load testing results. Informs CSRS urgency and capacity planning for 'Build Moat' pillar.

events.title: E2 Bug Debt Retrospective
events.description: Post-GA retrospective on ENG-9870, ENG-9194, ENG-9709 resolution. Process improvements for 'Nail the Core' quality bar.

events.title: North Star Metric Review - April
events.description: Monthly review of Decisions Captured Per Customer. Assess impact of E2 GA and Canvas updates on metric trend.

events.title: Multi-Asset Simulator Beta Launch
events.description: ENG-9856: Ship multi-asset simulator to beta customers. Key 'Embed Deeper' capability for complex testing workflows.
